## What does this PR do?

A clear and concise description.

## Linked issue

Fixes #<issue_number> or "Relates to #<issue_number>".

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Hardware profile addition
- [ ] New Hermes skill
- [ ] Eval set expansion

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code / docs
- [ ] I have commented my code where the logic is non-obvious
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix / feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`

## v3 invariant check (if applicable)

- [ ] Named Vectors `text_vec(768) + image_vec(512)` preserved
- [ ] Single worker indexer preserved
- [ ] "Memory never forgotten" preserved
- [ ] "Never auto-move files" preserved
- [ ] Local-first only preserved
- [ ] N/A (docs / non-functional change)

## Screenshots / logs (if applicable)

Add screenshots or paste logs to help reviewers.

## Additional context

Anything else reviewers should know.
